result.stderr:
AzureActiveDirectoryAuthCLITool 1.0.0
2022
USAGE:
Pass values for each of these values to gain an valid bearer token. Instance
will default to https://login.microsoftonline.com/:
  aadauth --ClientId xxx --Instance https://login.microsoftonline.com/ --Scopes
  xxx,xxx --Secret xxx --TenantId xxx

  -i, --Instance    The AAD Instance url. Defaults to
                    https://login.microsoftonline.com/

  -t, --TenantId    Required. The AAD TenantId.

  -c, --ClientId    Required. The AAD ClientId.

  -s, --Secret      Required. The AAD Client Secret.

  -o, --Scopes      Required. A comma-separated list of AAD Client Scopes. It is
                    ok to only have one.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
